event: Ceiling with Mythological and Allegorical Medallions (Semi-Gods Ceiling)
description: A photograph of an elaborate ceiling decorated with a grid of octagonal and smaller square panels, each containing a painted scene. The panels are set within a dark gilded framework creating a coffered effect. The individual scenes depict various classical or mythological figures and narratives in rich colors. The overall arrangement is highly symmetrical and geometric, with dozens of individual painted medallions filling the entire ceiling surface.
